_comment: Compliance Badge component data for Stack Ranked. Each Mandatory Training card (see the `trainings` array in cards.json) awards a Compliance Badge when resolved; this file gives each of those 12 trainings its own collectible badge token — the physical seal a player takes when they clear that training. It is the single source of truth for generate_badges.py (which lays out docs/Stack_Ranked_Badges.pdf, 6 punch-out tokens per badge type) and pairs with badge-art-prompts.txt (one image-generation prompt per badge, matching `image` below). `training` / `trainingEffect` mirror cards.json verbatim; `grants` is how many Compliance Badges that training awards (all 1 except New Manager Training). Rules-wise Compliance Badges stay fungible (2 to promote into Director, 4 into VP) — the per-training identity here is a printable-component flourish, not a rules change.

badges.name: Cybersecurity Aware
badges.motto: The email had a countdown timer.
badges.training: Cybersecurity Awareness: You Clicked the Phishing Link

badges.name: Data Privacy Certified
badges.training: Data Privacy Training (Promises Retention By Lunch)

badges.name: Fire Safety Certified
badges.motto: The map is for another building.

badges.name: New Manager Certified
badges.trainingEffect: Gain 2 Compliance Badges instead of the usual 1.

badges.name: Bias Workshop Graduate
badges.training: Bias Workshop (Everyone Assumes It's About Someone Else)

badges.name: Phishing Test Cleared
badges.trainingEffect: Standard. Additionally, whoever has the least Political Capital also gains 1 Burnout.

badges.name: Ethics Certified
badges.training: Ethics Training (Sponsored By the Thing That Caused It)
